title: Workspace template
excerpt: we’ve created a workspace template with multiple boards grouped in different folders and sub-folders. When we use the template the folder structure is lost. Can we avoid that?

posts.author: PrachiN (PrachiN)
posts.cookedHtml: we’ve created a workspace template with multiple boards grouped in different folders and sub-folders. When we use the template the folder structure is lost. Can we avoid that?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @PrachiN and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

You can follow these steps to keep the order:

  1. Click on the blue “+” button
  2. Click on “Add from templates”
  3. Search for the template and click on it
  4. Click on the arrow pointing down (next to “Use template”)
  5. Click on “New Workspace”

Your template will be used in a new workspace and the structure will be there.

It can not be done inside an existing workspace.

Cheers,
Matias
